desc: %i:scaleAS% +?% Attack Speed

name: Giant's Belt
desc: %i:scaleHealth% +? Health

name: Tentacle Slam
desc:
Every ? seconds, summon a tentacle that slams down on the target, dealing ? physical damage and healing the holder for ?% max health.

Illaoi Bonus: If this item is equipped on Illaoi, an additional tentacle slams targets drained by her ability at ?% effectiveness. 

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Guiding Hex
desc:
Every ? seconds, fire a bolt at a random enemy in Attack Range, dealing ? magic damage.

Aurora Bonus: If this item is equipped on Aurora, she gains ? Ability Power when the bolt hits.

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: B.F. Sword
desc: %i:scaleAD% +?% Attack Damage

name: Savage Slicer
desc:
Attacks hit the target and all adjacent enemies for ?% of Basic Attack Damage. Omnivamp applies ?% to this damage.

Briar Bonus: If this item is equipped on Briar, on cast this effect happens ? times.

name: Spatula
desc: It must do something...

name: Frying Pan
desc: ...why else would it be here?

name: Rocket Swarm
desc:
Every ? Mana spent, fire a barrage of ? rockets at the target, each dealing ?% %i:TFTBaseAD% physical damage.

Jinx Bonus: If this item is equipped on Jinx, instead replace all ability bullets with rockets that deal ?% increased damage.

name: Anima Emblem
desc: The holder gains the Anima trait.
